No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no information or activities related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or schedule that relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content does not address health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops basic language skills and cultural literacy (Target 4.7), which are core components of quality education.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any information pertaining to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no mention of energy, renewable energy, or energy efficiency within the course materials.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Conversational topics like '교통' (transportation) and '전화' (telephone) offer a minimal, indirect link to infrastructure (Targets 9.1, 9.c), but the course does not focus on infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Developing 'Humanity literacy & science' through language learning can foster intercultural understanding, indirectly promoting social inclusion and reducing inequalities based on origin (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The topic '교통' (transportation) provides a very weak, inferred link to sustainable transport systems (Target 11.2), but the course does not address urban sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The syllabus lacks any content related to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or schedule that relates to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not address marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable use of marine resources.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, forests, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' directly supports the rule of law and intellectual property rights, aligning with Target 16.3.
